reviews.review_description:
There are 6 experiences that have different narration and visuals. They seem to be the same each time. You can adjust the visuals and sound experience to a small degree. The narration is meant to be encouraging I think but comes across as just telling me Think happy thoughts! which does nothing for me. 
I have to say I am pretty disappointed and have had much better experiences with Liminal and Liminal was free. I would return this if it was at all possible. Can't believe I spent my tiny budget on this tbh. It was ok the graphics were pretty but don't change each time or anything. Same graphic, same narration. I probably won't use it much- for what it cost me, not worth it.

developer_response.body: Hi! The app currently has 22 experiences, (not 6). You can use the arrow buttons or your thumbstick to go through the home menu pages. Try some of the most recent ones on page 3&4. Maybe this will change your mind about the rating? Thanks and best wishes, Marc

reviews.review_description: I love this,I do use the guided meditation sometimes but for me I prefer it as a music visualiser,lie, flat on my bed  turn off sounds, put on my headphones, using the pipe for meditative breathing and the different controls to change visuals to the music. I prefer the visuals that take you on a journey through different visuals. If this could be linked to Spotify in some way with visuals reacting to beats  and rhythm it would be beyond awesome. I have forever missed GROOVR and this is the closest I've found, All music sound so much better and I can totally switch off from the world. Keep developing this, can't wait for more visuals journeys.

reviews.review_title: Hands Down the Best VR Experience
reviews.review_description:
This is what you are looking for. It's that complete immersion and detached from reality experience you've been trying to find. Guided meditation with beautiful visuals and interesting controls. It's not like hey here's a 3D landscape and some animal rendering assets. Instead it's individual strands of fiber, particles of smoke, streaks and drops of paint...etc all which you can manipulate once you get comfortable and confident with controls.
To be honest I have yet to come across another experience like it for VR. You really get lost in the different environments and captivated with the sensations. A great way to unwind after a long day. When you take your headset off you almost feel like something's missing and want to go back.
Some of the experiences are lackluster so be sure to try at least five because I didn't give it a fair try before I rage quit and now there's at least four of them I'm all the time coming in to revisit.

I've had this app for a year or 2 and wanted to leave a review to say how awesome this experience is. I was doing it everyday then life got busy this year, I took a break and man I'm glad to be back and see new ones on here and those are awesome, it just leaves you feeling like you went on a mind journey and so tingling and anew every time. The most colorful and awe experience for the vr, thank you!!! Beautiful colors and experience for those on the ascension awakening journey, not to mention the truths spoken, truly a gift to have, I appreciate the effort and work that went into this, life changing, Thank you 🫶❤️❤️❤️

Exactly what I was looking for. Has lots of different options so never bored and can switch it up to suit my mood. But I didn't want to pay for a subscription service since I won't use it enough over time. For $30 one time fee this is a great price for the value of the app's features!

I’ve tried A LOT of meditation apps, both in the headset and on my phone. I’ve liked many of them, but I’ve never experienced anything like this one before. The graphics are gorgeous, for one, but the meditation experience blows me away. The combination of methodologies is fantastic. I especially love the humming sections. I’ve tried apps with humming breath work before, and have always felt rather silly doing it—and more to the point, I haven’t found it especially relaxing. (Perhaps because I feel self-conscious doing it.) But in this app, it’s almost magical. I can just feel my body and mind powering down, relaxing. I truly feel like I’ve reached a trance state, which I’ve never experienced before. Last night I did a 20 minute session. As soon as the session was over, I took a quick glance at my Fitbit to see what my heart rate was—and it was 54! My usual resting heart rate is 66. So when I say this app works for me, I’m not kidding. I would recommend it to anyone who wants to try to meditation—or who has tried meditation before and not been in to it. And even for people who’ve been meditating for years (like me). I’d give it 10 stars if I could.
This vr app is so great 💯 Thank you for creating it. You have done a very good job. I would recommend this to anyone who is looking for a very cool experience.

One of the most beautifully curated meditation experiences out there. A lot of „levels“ to choose from, from awe inspiring to horizon expanding, each one a masterpiece - visually stunning, interactive and full of wisdom. 
A must have for anyone wanting to try meditation or just seeking relaxation as well as experienced meditators. 
Absolutely recommend. 
Well done to the developers, thank you for bringing this to the world for people to enjoy! 
Available with German and English narration.

A lot of VR apps try to do what Realms of Flow does. However, most fall short either in visuals or quality of narration/meditation. Realms of flow is the first app I've tried that is amazing at both! Visuals are awe-inspiring and the narration puts me into a state of beautiful, peaceful calm or inspiration. There's also really creative interactive elements like Pan Drum and Hookah! It sounded gimmicky when I read it but when I tried it, it added another fun layer to already amazing experience.
this is best app out there.

reviews.review_title: Thank you developers for this gem
reviews.review_description:
Realms of Flow is simply amazing! 
I can not recommend this app enough. So much thought has gone in to creating this app on so many levels. I bow to the developers who have created these visually stunning experiences but at the same time baked in breathing, guided meditations so many different input methods. One can even sing or hum into the space and the meditative space reacts to it or let one controller rest on the belly and let the flow of breath guide the journey. The granularity and depth of the UI is a bit overwhelming at first glance, but with a little curiosity it’s like a control panel to one’s own mind/body/spirit experience. Thank you thank you thank you!
With the different settings available, you can have a new experience every time. Amazing visuals and sound frequency option are choice. Great times to be had
This is my happy place. Thank you for being whimsically brilliant!
By far the best meditation experience you can have.

This is stunning 
I have no words 
This is going to be the most favorite app in my daily mindfulness and meditation moments

reviews.review_title: The best one I've found so far
reviews.review_description: i've tried out all of the other meditation apps on the meta quest store and this is the best one that I've found so far. The visuals are breathtaking. It feels like i'm in a dream. The settings for each of the experiences allow almost complete control of the elements. I've purchased over 200 apps on the meta quest store, and this is the only one that i felt so compelled so far to write a review. Completely worth the cost. I give it my highest recommendation. I want to thank the developers of this software, and I look forward to seeing what else they create.

This is THE ONE. I'm like many people and have a hard time shutting the ol' noodle down when it's time to relax and sleep. I've tried a few meditation apps but this one is really the best! It's far and away got the superior graphics. Other apps have imaginitive, enjoyable scenes but the atmosphere is impaired by lesser quality graphics that prevents total immersion. Not so with RoF! The graphics quality is so amazing that I can stop analyzing it and just enjoy it. 
There are many ways to customize each experience to get exactly what suits you. I haven't even begun to really experiment with the settings yet, but you can control breath technique and timing, sounds, spatial effects, duration and a bunch of other stuff. 
Right now my favorite is "Starry Blankets". It is so soothing, it really does take be back to a time where I didn't have to worry about anything and knew I was safe and sound  because mom and dad were right outside my bedroom door watching tv. I actually find myself nodding off before it's even halfway through, which I can tell you is a refreshing novelty to this insomniac! I'm looking forward to trying more experiences!
The best meditation app I have found. The visuals are gorgeous.

this app is unbelievably beautiful. So strikingly immersive. At first i thought wow how cool are these visuals but i went on a journey with the mirror and fractal experience with the rain drum and i got a "euphoric happy tears moment " it got pretty overwhelming... In a good way🥰 . I have a teenage niece who tried the app who said she was mesmerized and eventually fell asleep💓. Thank you for this app !!!!

I have had other similar apps like Tripp and Headspace in the past and although I have always thought mindfulness could benefit my busy life, never really found it grabbed me, until now. I'd maybe do 5 mins of the other apps, I'm ADHD so find concentrating on one thing tough, this however has me in such a state of calm its amazing.  Admittedly I turn off the voice guidance as that's just not my thing but the rest is  subliminal. I have just ended a 30 min session and honestly don't think I've felt so relaxed in maybe 20 years, it really is that good. 

Thanks.
Simple, no subscription, trippy and enjoyable while relaxing.

The closest you can get to ingesting a hallucinogen without actually taking one! A masterfully crafted, highly creative and ultimately mind blowing relaxation app! I look forward to more otherworldly patterns in the future. And lastly, as one other reviewer mentioned, it would be lovely to have the option of swapping out the soundtrack with something of one's choosing.

reviews.review_title: Please create a way to nickname the expe
reviews.review_description:
I see you have many wonderful reviews so I'm not going to be redundant that it's a great app etc. However, I often can't really remember what each one was good for for me personally, such as, I might rename one "inner childcare" or "grounding" or something. ￼

It would be amazing if you allowed us to nickname a experience, even if it was in one of the saved slots.

Thanks!
When I'm tired and don't feel like doing anything, I like to just zone out and immerse myself in this dream world.

reviews.review_title: Found what I was looking for
reviews.review_description: Realms of Flow is great. It's firmly established in cosmic conscious. It is a calming, visual experience that resonates not only through your mind, but entire body. I highly recommend.

Not being a "gamer" these sort of apps were the reason for buying a Q3 and after buying pretty much all of them this is by far my favorite and perhaps has the best visuals of anything ive seen on the Quest so far. All the available scenarios are great but my fav is Vivid Flow which is a high definition visual TRIP! A must have app IMO.
Love this app  when I want to relax at night. Love the spoken word as well, I hope they continue to create new content, because it's amazing!
It became my favourite app on quest. Amazing visuals. I get lost on these for long time. I hope for more in the future. I will buy any dlc of this
Please put the right frequencies 440hz is not good for alignment. 432hz is the right one, please also add the chakra frequencies. Or allow us to customise the binaural frequencies.
This is my favourite app for relaxation and meditation and is highly configurable.

I've tried a few similar apps but was put off by the price of this. Snagged it during a 30% off sale and... wow! I'd pay full price now I've used it. Genuinely the best visuals I've seen on the meta quest 3. This is a real app, clearly made by people who know what they are doing. It's a huge install - but for a good reason! The only thing that would make this better is if it could react to my own choice of music. I'd die if that was added!

This is the first Meta Game I have ever purchased that didn't leave me feeling buyers remorse! This is pretty much virtual therapy for a small one time fee! The voices used to narrate each session are very soothing. I've been using it for 1 week and already feel a change in the way I think and perceive reality! Looking forward to more updates! A highly recommended VR App!
Waiting for some more magic ✨️

I love this app very much however the only thing that is getting my eyes stuck from rolling back into my head is I see zero way to go back to the main menu after selecting a scene. It gets stuck on the config and a long presss does NOT take you home unless you luanxh the scene. Unless I am totally missing something this is a very poor design choice forcing me into something before being able to change my mind and go back. I tried every button and all I can do is close the app completely or go into the scene in order to go back to home. Seems pretty ignorant to me I am a human and change my mind often.

Really no simple back function?

I do love it though despite this minor annoyance

Oh my gosh.
Yesterday I found the dissolve trailer in 180 3D on the Rival video App. Instant love for the beautiful atmosphere. Hoped that the "in app" experience would live up to the trailer/teaser. Baught it right away - and what can I say ?

After playing half life Alyx, this is the first time I was absolutely stunned and swept away by a VR experience.

Can't wait for tonight to dive into it a bit more.

One little annoyance I found right away: once you start the good but lengthy Tutorial by accident, there is no obvious way to close it as an early exit back to the main menu.

Other than that - absolutely gorgeous App! Really

reviews.review_title: Outstanding visual effects. I love this
reviews.review_description: Very nice selection of different experiences. I enjoy the included audio, but will often listen to my own music while viewing the effects. I move around quite a bit while standing while watching the app one thing that I’ve done recently is turn on the option to have the scene follow the view, this allows me to face different directions and turn my head, including looking at the ceiling and having the visual effects appear where I’m looking. I use this app a lot and the more I use it the more I enjoy it. ￼

Finally, a meditation app that takes advantage of the Quest 3 hardware. Very beautiful, immersive environments with fantastic graphics. I wish it had more options for narration (like the Tripp composer) but otherwise it is loaded with options. I can't wait to see what they do with it.

I love this so much. Helps me to relax and take my mind away from back pain, from a broken back. I'm in my sixties. 
Well done Devs.

I've tried all the meditation apps, but always found something was missing until this app.  The breath sensing with the controller makes it perfect for me.   There are so many settings the options for customization of the experience are enormous.  I cant think of anything else that could be added to make it better.

I’m so glad I discovered this fantastic relaxation app.  There are so many settings and configurations that you will definitely find your favorite with regards to breathing, voice over, graphic depth, and visual themes. They even included a hookah that responds to your breathing and a hand pan drum to tinker with while relaxing. This is my go to app for winding down and focusing before bed or when I’m stressed. The developer is amazingly responsive and is constantly updating with new themes and visuals. Highly recommended!

Lots of trippy immersive kaleidoscopes, hope they keep adding more! An audio-visual responsiveness feature like Mezmer would be awesome, wish I could listen to music with this. 

My favorite is Dissolve, it’s like being eaten by Jean Jacket from Nope, but fun!

Gorgeous looking app was very happy when I saw the file size and knew it wouldn't be low res garbage. Genuinely beautiful.

Developer please consider astral projection out of body sounds for your next update (please 🙏)

And thank you for this beautiful app
Truly special. My first Quest purchase, zero regrets!
This app is OUTSTANDING. Absolutely beautiful visuals, gorgeous music, and intuitive controls. I love the reminders to breathe while meditating/watching the flow.

I’m so pleased I found this gem of an app to assist with my ‘mindfulness’ practices.

It’s not hard to understand why it gets one of the highest 5 star ratings in the Meta app store.

The quality of the graphics is way above all its rivals.  So to is the configurability, clever structure to the entire programme layout right through to the pricing which is a one off payment for life and includes any new content added (several updates already).

I cannot recommend this app enough -  just outstanding.  I hope the very talented programmer continues to develop new apps along the lines of this meditation style / category…

This is one of the very best things I've purchased in my years of owning a Quest headset. You get so much incredible content for such a reasonable price! Nuanced and beautiful visuals. Lovely messages to contemplate! FANTASTIC!! Absolutely LOVE IT!

Tried different apps to find peace and calmness, after my first session with this app I might never go back to any competitor. The visuals are amazing, the sound design is perfect, the voices are soothing and the variety is more than I had wished for. Hardly have ever felt a deeper calmness than within the realms. Please please please keep on adding new stuff, can‘t wait to dive in again. 10/5 stars.

I'm a huge fan of his other app - Conscious Existence. What an app this is, he's totally nailed it. I use this to prepare myself for my proper meditation session - it's intense. Different things for different people, for me the chanting and binaural beats do it every time. A must-have app.
Great visuals and narrations, exceeded expectations.  Very clean graphics, clear step above pixelated visuals from other apps.  Highly recommend for calming meditation or awe in other wordly visuals.
Beautiful graphics combined with exceptional customization makes this a simply AMAZING experience!

reviews.review_title: Best meditation app I’ve tried in VR!
reviews.review_description:
*I'm using a translator 
Everything feels well-designed and polished. The only thing I’d love to see is more other language support. As a Korean user, I can only understand a small part of the narration. Even just having Korean subtitles would make a big difference. It doesn’t need to be a full voice recording.

That aside, the level of customization is amazing, and the visuals are top-notch. This is easily the most immersive and relaxing meditation experience I’ve had in VR. Can’t wait to see what future updates bring!

reviews.review_title: One of the best experiences in VR!
reviews.review_description: What an amazing experience, so unique and beautifully made.
I have tried the others, and have been kind of “meh” on all of them. I LOVE this one. Really makes me miss the OLED display on original Quest. That kind of contrast would do this app justice.

It is difficult to find that true " wow factor" within the hardware of quest 3, that truly awe inspiring,  jaw dropping moment when vr is truly surprising. I've played a lot of titles like Trip and liminal, a lot of the mediation apps, this is the best. Period. Jaw-dropping visuals, the ability to use brain wave and drainment and customize the sessions, closest to being on a psilocybin trip you will find! I hope they Continue to update this masterpiece
Absolutely quality and 100% recommended, I really love it!

reviews.review_title: Can't BE MAD 😡 I'd PAID Double 🤑 💵 💵
reviews.review_description: So much for a loss of words ✨️ when you'll  discover it has narration (within) that'll explain  to you in breathe 💨 of a hum 🎶  & the visuals you'll witness unimaginable 🥰. Yeah I had a chance to purchased it -30% off but like said "can't Be MAD" after paying $59, $49 & $39 for others like similar this rivals them ALL with more to come added. I can't wait ... but till then I do have enough to hold me over (within) solace ✌🏽👁✨️

Narration is a bunch of clap-trap. The voice work is good so sometimes I listen to it in German, since I don’t understand German. But the writing is empty at best. The narrative on Vivid Flow starts alright, talking about shutting out the outside world, just you, stress doesn’t exist, don’t need to make anyone happy, etc, then it spirals into the same nonsense they all are. One of them starts, to be or not to be…(choose to be if you can, duh).

This is otherwise a really good app. It’s a league ahead of the ones people have compared it to. But mute that narration.

Visuals are amazing! If you are looking for an experience where you feel your entire body immerse into the landscape , this is the one. A true relaxing experience. Beats any other VR visual of the same nature. Enhances the Quest 3 visual. Easy and prompt responses from the designer with any questions. Highly recommend 🤗
Beautifully designed, wonderful pointing  - like having your own "fortress of solitude" right at your fingertips

reviews.review_title: A MUST if you have Anxiety or Depression
reviews.review_description: I have tried every meditation app available, both Meta Store and PC and this is by far the best of them all. The visuals and audio are amazing, far superior to any others. The quality of the overall menus and options are amazing.

What I just experienced was so far beyond anything I thought the Quest headset was capable of, I feel compelled to update my initial review. The recent update introduced the experience called “Mellow Embrace”, and WOW! This presentation of visual and audio stimuli, is nothing short of EXQUISITE. I urge you to treat yourself to this new experience. Creativity-Actualized




(Original review)
This App is the evolution of Tech-Assisted Meditation Training. The high quality graphics are what caught my attention, but the professional quality / calibre of the voiceover dialogueand features such as breath indicators + binaural beats puts Realms of Flow on the cutting edge. The humming option combined with breath work is unique and powerful. The wide palette of customization options allows the user to completely optimize the experience on an individual basis. I have been in VR since day 1, and I always suspected that this medium would one day be a useful tool for those pursuing spiritual exploration, and Realms of Flow takes a giant step towards realizing that potential.
I love high-quality, professional work – and this is exactly that!

The best app I've bought so far on the quest. So far I've been using it as a 3d visual stimulus while listening to music on my phone through headphones, and for that alone it's more than worth the money. There's 18 experiences currently, and each one can be customised in a variety of ways to create 5 or 6 noticeably different environments within each experience. It's blown my mind how amazing it looks and the immersion is incredible! There's also a variety of different breathing features for those looking for more of a meditation experience, but I haven't had the chance to delve into those features too much yet.

The only improvement I can think of, would be the option to be able to customise the colours on some of the more abstract experiences. Even if it was the choice of 2 or 3 different preset colour themes for each one, it would be amazing to be able to customise it that way.
Impossible to capture the beauty of these experiences in words. Worth the cost of my Quest 3.

reviews.review_title: Best experience in the Quest 3 so far
reviews.review_description: Mindblowing

After reading all the positive reviews, I decided to give this a go as an alternative to Tripp (which I also enjoy). The graphics are just amazing and there are so many options. I find myself using it every day!

This is just what I have been looking for - full customization to meditate how I want to. I have tried so many other meditation apps and this one checks all the boxes for me. The visuals are breathtaking, the ambient sounds just right, and easy access to all controls during the session. What sets this apart from all the others is the granular way I can customize each and every theme. Time will tell if I get bored with it, but for now, it will be my new favorite meditation/chill out app.

Very good app. Unfortunately I got the smaller memory quest 3, and I’m gonna refund to save space because I want to upgrade my Q3 sometime 

There’s a lot of good tangible guided vr meditation here. Highlights for me were interactive breathing and positive mindful spoken philosophies for thoughtful meditation . More of that!

This app is by far the most visual and sound  appealing meditation app out there and so many settings you can adjust. It’s like trippin without drugs 🤩 worth every penny.
The actual visuals are way beyond what you expect after seeing the trailer

reviews.review_title: This is my daily driver! Best purchase!
reviews.review_description:
Now, I use this app every time i reach for the Quest.  It is amazing how come it took me so long to come across this app. This is truly a must-have! the design, music, sounds, voice-over, UI, visuals, the experience, and everything else is top-notch! The developer is a genius who loves his work because it shows, and he is still updating it with increable content! Words can't express how happy I am that this app exists.
God bless the developer for making this.

This is everything I've ever wanted since 1st experiencing a kaleidoscope visualizer app in early days of vr. Also has great guided meditations, binaural beats, & constantly updated. Importantly (to me anyway) is the lack of internet connection most meta apps have these days. Thanks to the dev team for this outstanding program!!!
As a VR user, I'm always looking for experiences that can't be replicated on a flat screen. This app is one of them. both calm and thought-provoking,  the experiences are quite the trip.

reviews.review_title: This is a Gem for a Quest 3!
reviews.review_description: Outstanding visual and audio experience. Takes you away from the world and its troubles. Love it! Kudos to the developer.

I just started using it last night, and I really appreciate that not only can I adjust the video quality, but I can also customize breathing patterns!

I'm not sure if it was just my imagination, but the quality of my sleep last night seemed to improve.

I have one question: Is there a setting to automatically black out the screen and end the session, or display a notification when the specified session time is over?

Additionally, I have a request: It would be great if you could add subtitles for narration or support Meta Quest's live captions for non-English speakers and those with hearing impairments like myself.

[Additional Comment – February 12, 2025]
Thank you for adding more slots to the General settings!
Now I can easily use three different settings for waking up, before bed, and other situations.
This is a very helpful update—thank you!
If you’re into altered states of consciousness, meditation or love stunning, yet relaxing visuals this is a fantastic VR experience.
Doing this after a spliff..  blew my mind,what an experience.all I can do is thank the devs.THANK YOU

Was looking for alternative to Tripp and came across this app and was blown away by the quality of audio and visuals. Customization is also top notch.  Looking forward to additional environments. If you liked Tripp, you'll love this.
If your mind is altered, this app will blow your mind. Highly recommended.

First things first. The visualisations in this app are gorgeous and varied. If you are looking for something you can chill out and wow to, you will enjoy this app. 

There are also several other aspects; A voice narrative, interactive options, breathing patterns, humming guidance, binaural tones. You can set your own preferred experience, setting the times that each of these features fade into the session. Personally, I didn't enjoy the narration, it felt like the kind of life-coaching claptrap you can hear from any number of unqualified social media broadcasters, and the voice wasn't really to my liking. I would have preferred meditative guidance using established techniques. But the great thing is, I can turn this off and just create my own sessions. I particularly like the binaural tones and strobing lights, they have a definite calming effect. 

As a meditative app, it's not quite there for me. But as a general chill-out app, it certainly does the trick.

I’ve tried all kinds of meditative, immersive, and relaxation experiences, and this one is by far the best! The visual quality is superb, and each session features a soothing voice that gently guides you through breathing, oneness, and mindful awareness. Everything is highly customizable: you can enable or disable breathing aids, visualizations, and patterns at will. There’s also an option for binaural tones at various frequencies, as well as a humming mode. You can truly tailor the experience to your current needs. 

Best of all, the developers don’t force you to create an account or bombard you with ads, unlike many similar apps. This is simply the best of the best!
